case_title: ESTHER FLATTO VS. PRIDESTAFF, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: WRONGFUL DISCHARGE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLATTO, ESTHER AS TO DEFENDANT PRIDESTAFF, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ECLARO INTERNATIONAL, INC., A NEW YORK CORPORATION HEWLETT-PACKARD COMPANY DBA HP AUTONOMY, A DELAWAR E CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-01-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-30-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-09-2015
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-01-2015 CONTINUED TO MAY-13-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-23-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-23-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-13-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 15133082)
